aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup, but lacks depth in content and optimization for AI search. The focus on local services is a strength, but more structured data and detailed content are needed.
quick_wins: Expand service pages with detailed content and relevant keywords.
Implement FAQ schema to address common customer queries.
Add customer reviews and testimonials to build trust and provide fresh content.

gbp_analysis.found: The website includes location-based keywords like 'Heath & Rockwall, TX' and a list of service areas.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has a clear local focus, but the Google Business Profile (GBP) is likely not optimized. There are no reviews on Google, which significantly impacts local search visibility.
critical_issues: No GBP setup or optimization is evident.
Lack of customer reviews on Google.

nap_citations.summary: The business name, address, and phone number (NAP) are present on the website, but there is no evidence of consistent citations across other platforms.
action_items: Ensure consistent NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
Create and verify profiles on major citation sites like Yelp, Bing Places, and Apple Maps.
Monitor and manage online reviews and ratings.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of detailed, keyword-rich content on service pages.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: AI search engines due to insufficient structured data and content depth.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement FAQ and HowTo schema to provide more context and information to AI search engines.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Develop a content strategy that includes blog posts, case studies, and detailed service descriptions to establish the business as an authority in the roofing and home improvement niche.
